justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's request for "around 3 PM on Wednesday" and found an available slot from 3 PM to 4 PM on Wednesday, June 3rd.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered information and booked the appointment in three turns without any unnecessary questions or redundant API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly understanding the user's request and successfully booking the appointment.
